Archived from [the original](https://www.timetemperature.com/time-zone-maps/south-america-time-zone-map.shtml) on 5 February 2018. Retrieved 4 February 2018.

["Official Time"](https://web.archive.org/web/20190420185523/https://horaoficial.cl/index_ing.php). Chilean Navy Hydrographic and Oceanographic Service. Archived from [the original](http://www.horaoficial.cl/index_ing.php) on 20 April 2019. Retrieved 17 June 2019.
["Paraguay Congress Approves Permanent DST"](https://www.timeanddate.com/news/time/paraguay-abolish-dst-2024.html). *timeanddate.com*. 25 September 2024. Retrieved 1 January 2025.

**UTC−03:00** is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of −03:00.

## As daylight saving time (Northern Hemisphere summer)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9203:00&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: As daylight saving time (Northern Hemisphere summer)")]

Principal cities: [Halifax](/wiki/Halifax,_Nova_Scotia "Halifax, Nova Scotia"), [Saint John](/wiki/Saint_John,_New_Brunswick "Saint John, New Brunswick"), [Fredericton](/wiki/Fredericton "Fredericton"), [Hamilton](/wiki/Hamilton,_Bermuda "Hamilton, Bermuda"), [Sydney](/wiki/Sydney,_Nova_Scotia "Sydney, Nova Scotia")

### North America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9203:00&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: North America")]

* Canada – [Atlantic Time Zone](/wiki/Atlantic_Time_Zone "Atlantic Time Zone")
  + [New Brunswick](/wiki/New_Brunswick "New Brunswick")
  + [Newfoundland and Labrador](/wiki/Newfoundland_and_Labrador "Newfoundland and Labrador")
    - [Labrador](/wiki/Labrador "Labrador")
      * Except the area between [L'Anse-au-Clair](/wiki/L%27Anse-au-Clair "L'Anse-au-Clair") and [Norman's Bay](/wiki/Norman%27s_Bay "Norman's Bay")[[1]](#cite_note-ttnl-1)
  + [Nova Scotia](/wiki/Nova_Scotia "Nova Scotia")
  + [Prince Edward Island](/wiki/Prince_Edward_Island "Prince Edward Island")
* Denmark (see [time in the Danish Realm](/wiki/Time_in_the_Danish_Realm "Time in the Danish Realm"))
  + [Greenland](/wiki/Greenland "Greenland"), but with [DST rules from the US](/wiki/DST_in_the_US "DST in the US")
    - [Pituffik Space Base](/wiki/Pituffik_Space_Base "Pituffik Space Base")
* United Kingdom
  + [Bermuda](/wiki/Bermuda "Bermuda")

## As standard time (year-round)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9203:00&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: As standard time (year-round)")]

Principal cities: [Cayenne](/wiki/Cayenne "Cayenne"), [São Paulo](/wiki/S%C3%A3o_Paulo "São Paulo"), [Brasília](/wiki/Bras%C3%ADlia "Brasília"), [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Porto Alegre](/wiki/Porto_Alegre "Porto Alegre"), [Belo Horizonte](/wiki/Belo_Horizonte "Belo Horizonte"), [Buenos Aires](/wiki/Buenos_Aires "Buenos Aires"), [Montevideo](/wiki/Montevideo "Montevideo"), [Paramaribo](/wiki/Paramaribo "Paramaribo"), [Stanley](/wiki/Stanley,_Falkland_Islands "Stanley, Falkland Islands"), [Asunción](/wiki/Asunci%C3%B3n "Asunción")

### South America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9203:00&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: South America")]

* [Argentina](/wiki/Argentina "Argentina")
* [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")
  + Except the western states of [Acre](/wiki/Acre_(state) "Acre (state)"), [Amazonas](/wiki/Amazonas_(Brazilian_state) "Amazonas (Brazilian state)"), [Mato Grosso](/wiki/Mato_Grosso "Mato Grosso"), [Mato Grosso do Sul](/wiki/Mato_Grosso_do_Sul "Mato Grosso do Sul"), [Rondônia](/wiki/Rond%C3%B4nia "Rondônia") and [Roraima](/wiki/Roraima "Roraima"); and offshore islands
* Chile
  + [Magallanes/Antarctic](/wiki/Magallanes_Region "Magallanes Region")[[2]](#cite_note-ttsa-2)[[3]](#cite_note-chile-3)
* France
  + [French Guiana](/wiki/French_Guiana "French Guiana")
* [Paraguay](/wiki/Paraguay "Paraguay")[[4]](#cite_note-4)
* [Suriname](/wiki/Suriname "Suriname")
* [United Kingdom](/wiki/United_Kingdom "United Kingdom")
  + [Falkland Islands](/wiki/Falkland_Islands "Falkland Islands")
* [Uruguay](/wiki/Uruguay "Uruguay")

### Antarctica

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9203:00&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Antarctica")]

#### Southern Ocean

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9203:00&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Southern Ocean")]

* Some bases on the [Antarctic Peninsula](/wiki/Antarctic_Peninsula "Antarctic Peninsula") and nearby islands. See also [Time in Antarctica](/wiki/Time_in_Antarctica "Time in Antarctica")
* Argentina
  + [Argentine Antarctica](/wiki/Argentine_Antarctica "Argentine Antarctica")
  + [Carlini Base](/wiki/Carlini_Base "Carlini Base")
  + [San Martin Base](/wiki/San_Martin_Base "San Martin Base")
* United Kingdom
  + [British Antarctic Territory](/wiki/British_Antarctic_Territory "British Antarctic Territory")
  + [Rothera Research Station](/wiki/Rothera_Research_Station "Rothera Research Station")
* United States
  + [Palmer Station](/wiki/Palmer_Station "Palmer Station")

## As daylight saving time (Southern Hemisphere summer)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9203:00&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: As daylight saving time (Southern Hemisphere summer)")]

Principal cities: [Santiago](/wiki/Santiago "Santiago")

### South America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9203:00&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: South America")]

* [Chile](/wiki/Chile "Chile") (except [Easter Island](/wiki/Easter_Island "Easter Island") and [Magallanes/Antarctic](/wiki/Magallanes_Region "Magallanes Region"))

### Antarctica

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9203:00&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Antarctica")]

* Some bases on the [Antarctic Peninsula](/wiki/Antarctic_Peninsula "Antarctic Peninsula") and nearby islands. See also [Time in Antarctica](/wiki/Time_in_Antarctica "Time in Antarctica")

## Places using UTC−03:00, outside the 45°W ± 7.5° range

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%E2%88%9203:00&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Places using UTC−03:00, outside the 45°W ± 7.5° range")]

* [El Chaltén](/wiki/El_Chalt%C3%A9n "El Chaltén"), Argentina (72°53′W corresponding to UTC−04:51)
* [Buenos Aires](/wiki/Buenos_Aires "Buenos Aires"), Argentina (58°22′W corresponding to UTC−03:53:48)
* [Stanley, Falkland Islands](/wiki/Stanley,_Falkland_Islands "Stanley, Falkland Islands") (57°51'W corresponding to UTC−03:51:24)
* [Asunción](/wiki/Asunci%C3%B3n "Asunción"), Paraguay (57°38'W corresponding to UTC-03:50:32)
* [Uruguaiana](/wiki/Uruguaiana "Uruguaiana"), Brazil (57°05'W corresponding to UTC–03:48:20)
* [Montevideo](/wiki/Montevideo "Montevideo"), Uruguay (56°23’W corresponding to UTC−03:44:51)
* [Saint Pierre and Miquelon](/wiki/Saint_Pierre_and_Miquelon "Saint Pierre and Miquelon") (56°12′W corresponding to UTC−03:44:40)
* [Paramaribo](/wiki/Paramaribo "Paramaribo"), Suriname (55°10′W corresponding to UTC−03:40:40)
* [Recife](/wiki/Recife "Recife"), Brazil (34°54′W corresponding to UTC−02:19:36)
